notes: Overall the session felt pretty good. I do think that my shoulders and biceps were still a little tired from Saturday. We did get a little extra shoulder and bicep work in during the HIIT class but I was able to push through and get most of the reps here today.

notes:
I think this was a pretty good session. I had a rough weekend:
- Friday, I dealt with some personal stress.
- Saturday, I drank way more than I normally do, alcohol.
- Sunday was like a hangover day.


For having that situation I feel like the workout was actually really good today. I think if I didn't have a hangover yesterday, I would have been able to get a little even bit more in.
